title: 1 seat plans
excerpt: i’m a one man show company. i’d like to pay only for 1 seat. no need for the minimum seat plans.

posts.author: taxmancy (andrew)
posts.cookedHtml: i’m a one man show company. i’d like to pay only for 1 seat. no need for the minimum seat plans.

posts.author: nhashimoto (Naota Hashimoto)
posts.cookedHtml: Ideally they would let you increase the increments by 1 seat at a time.
